scope: Public source inventory for a future larval zebrafish active-inference simulation.

sources.title: Fish1 connectomics release
sources.access: public portal; CAVE access may require login/token
sources.simulation_relevance: Primary candidate for larval whole-brain cell/synapse network extraction.

sources.title: Fish1 CAVE tutorials
sources.simulation_relevance: Programmatic access examples for downloading cells, synapses, and annotations.

sources.title: A connectomic resource for neural cataloguing and circuit dissection of the larval zebrafish brain
sources.simulation_relevance: Companion paper for Fish1; describes scale, molecular annotations, and CAVE workflow.

sources.title: FishExplorer
sources.simulation_relevance: Atlas query and visualization layer for registered zebrafish neurons and datasets.

sources.title: FishExplorer, a multimodal cellular atlas platform for neuronal circuit dissection in larval zebrafish
sources.simulation_relevance: Documents cross-dataset atlas integration and direct neuron downloads.

sources.title: Automated synapse-level reconstruction of neural circuits in the larval zebrafish brain
sources.access: paper page plus public associated resources
sources.simulation_relevance: Smaller synapse-level visual-motion circuit suitable for first reduced connectome.

sources.title: Whole-brain serial-section electron microscopy in larval zebrafish
sources.simulation_relevance: Whole-brain ssEM baseline for anatomy, projectome, and structural registration.

sources.title: Correlative light and electron microscopy reveals the fine circuit structure underlying evidence accumulation in larval zebrafish
sources.simulation_relevance: Functional-to-structural hindbrain circuit linking evidence accumulation to wiring.

sources.title: Correlative light and electron microscopy reveals the fine circuit structure underlying evidence accumulation in larval zebrafish
sources.simulation_relevance: Functional H5, registration field, traced neurons, and axons for hindbrain evidence-accumulation circuit.

sources.title: Correlative Light and Electron Microscopy in an Intact Larval Zebrafish
sources.simulation_relevance: Methodological background for same-specimen LM/EM zebrafish reconstruction.

sources.title: Whole-brain activity mapping onto a zebrafish brain atlas
sources.simulation_relevance: Brain-region atlas, molecular markers, and whole-brain activity maps.

sources.title: ZFIN publication record for Z-Brain
sources.simulation_relevance: ZFIN-linked metadata for Randlett et al. 2015.

sources.title: mapzebrain
sources.simulation_relevance: Cellular-resolution larval brain atlas and registration target.

sources.simulation_relevance: Cellular atlas, region labels, morphology, and marker reference.

sources.title: High-precision registration between zebrafish brain atlases using symmetric diffeomorphic normalization
sources.simulation_relevance: Coordinate transform methodology between zebrafish atlas spaces.

sources.title: ZeBrain adult zebrafish brain atlas
sources.simulation_relevance: Adult reference atlas; useful later if simulation target expands beyond larvae.

sources.title: Brain-wide neuronal dynamics during motor adaptation in zebrafish
sources.simulation_relevance: Optic-flow motor adaptation and whole-brain calcium dynamics.

sources.simulation_relevance: Whole-brain GCaMP recordings and analysis stack.

sources.simulation_relevance: Visuomotor whole-brain activity maps for optic-flow behavior.

sources.simulation_relevance: ARTR and turn-sequence dynamics for spontaneous locomotion.

sources.simulation_relevance: Repository access to open manuscript and metadata.

sources.simulation_relevance: Large-scale whole-brain activity benchmark for model validation.

sources.simulation_relevance: Potential reference code for behavior/activity analysis.
